params.name: Blood of Cain
params.source: Reward from [[Demon God Device#Apocalypse Hall|Rocket Cabin: Demon God Device]]
params.description:
On Feb 9, 50,000 BC, Cain paid the bloody price of his wrongdoing.
Cain, the eldest son of Adam and Eve, killed his brother Abel out of jealousy and became the world's first murderer. God questioned him and Cain lied. He failed to deceive the all-knowing God, and so a curse was cast on Cain that he could only live in the shadows forever. In the east of the Garden of Eden, he and his descendants established their city. With his immortality, Cain escaped the great flood and left behind a flock …
